category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A full-strip desktop stapler with a steel base, a curved top arm, a slide-out staple tray inside the upper body, and a rear spring follower. The top arm rotates on a rear horizontal revolute hinge above the base, the staple tray slides prismatically along the upper rail for loading, the follower block slides prismatically inside the tray, and the clincher anvil under the nose rotates on a small pivot. Compact office-desk scale.
label: Full strip stapler with sliding tray

category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A compact half-strip desktop stapler with a weighted base, a rounded top arm, a front-loading staple tray, and a sliding paper stop on the base deck. The top arm pivots on a rear hinge over the base, the staple tray slides prismatically out from the front of the upper assembly, the paper stop slides prismatically along the base, and the rear release latch moves prismatically into the top housing. Small office-tool scale.
label: Compact stapler with tray and paper stop

category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A long-reach desktop stapler with an elongated base, a tall rear hinge support, a long top arm, and a removable staple tray carried inside the upper rail. The top arm and upper rail rotate together on a rear horizontal revolute hinge, the staple tray slides prismatically for loading, the rear follower tab slides along the tray channel, and the front anvil plate rotates on a small pivot beneath the stapling nose. Mailroom or reception-desk scale.
label: Long reach stapler with removable tray

category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A die-cast desktop stapler with a flat rectangular base, a broad low-profile top arm, a side-guided staple tray, and a reversible anvil under the front tip. The top arm rotates on a rear revolute hinge above the base, the staple tray translates prismatically within the upper body on its guide rails, and the reversible anvil rotates on a short central pivot in the base. Dense desk accessory scale with a practical office silhouette.
label: Die cast stapler with tray and anvil

category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A premium desktop stapler with a heavy base, a tapered top arm, a pull-out staple tray below the arm shell, and a small depth guide at the front of the base. The top arm pivots on a rear horizontal hinge, the staple tray slides prismatically along the body for reloading, the depth guide slides prismatically on the base, and the rear follower block translates along the tray channel as a separate supported part. Standard desktop office scale.
label: Premium stapler with pull out tray
